_note: Scraped from legacy.talktalent.com/polls (custom platform, no export/API). Closed polls carry aggregate results (legacy_vote_count derived from displayed % x total). The one active poll (John Anderson MSP) had its breakdown hidden, so it is imported as a fresh live poll. Comment dates are relative on legacy ('5 months ago'); we approximate created_at.

polls.question: How frequently does your MSP provider perform a staffing supplier business review?
Which statement best describes what you want help with right now? (select all that apply)

options.text: Avoiding bad or biased hiring decisions
Helping interviewers ask better, more consistent questions
Making clearer, more confident hiring decisions
Replacing messy DIY interview process with one shared system

comments.content: Considerations for diversifying our recruiting tech stack, being mindful of how to remain agile, do more with less, and avoid becoming too reliant on any one platform
Employer Branding when it comes to global Series B start-ups and getting internal stakeholder buy-in.

polls.question: Do you prefer the daily updates on TA News as a Forum Post, or is the weekly update in the newsletter more effective?

comments.content: I have created an AI agent that develops news stories for TALK - it can be delivered either method - last week I tested daily, and the newsletter has a news section as well. Is there a version that works better for you?

polls.question: Would you trust AI to lead first-round interviews? (select all that apply)

options.text: No, interviews should always be live
Yes, if it’s structured and fair

polls.question: TALK is planning local events this Fall. What timeframe would be the most interesting and convenient for you? (select all that apply)
Does your organization utilize temporary/contingent labor, if so, how are external workers managed today?

options.text: Currently have an MSP/VMS in place today
Unmanaged - no visibility into headcount or spend
Considering bringing in an MSP and/or VMS

polls.question: What is the hardest part of running interviews today? (select all that apply)

options.text: Interview quality varies too much by interviewer

polls.question: IN 2026 Planning, what are you prioritizing?

options.text: Redesigning your recruiting tech stack and process
Deeping internal mobility to reduce external hiring needs?
Hiring for new skills in an AI-Transformation

comments.content: Don't see an answer that fits you? Drop it in the comments below!
